phoneticUs: k忙藞胃e瑟; k蓹藞胃e瑟
examples: Cathay Pacific flies daily nonstop to Hong Kong.
Cathay Pacific has set the standard against which all other airport lounges are judged.
Swire and CITIC both reduced their holdings in Cathay and Air China bought 17.5% of it.
China Eastern Airlines rose 1.7%, Air China gained 1.9%, and Cathay Pacific Airways added 3.5%.
The relationship between Air China and Cathay Pacific Airways appears to be growing even closer.
